name: My Bloody Valentine
bio: My Bloody Valentine keeps earning through deep catalog listening, genre influence, and steady long-tail discovery among alternative listeners.
notable_for: Shoegaze recordings with unusually strong replay depth and critic-driven longevity.
career_highlight: Loveless-era tracks remain core reference points in alternative catalog listening.
revenue_drivers: Dedicated fan listening sustains long-tail streaming.
Critical stature and genre influence help maintain discovery.
Alternative and mood-based playlists extend catalog life.
